features.description: Server-side tax rate + jurisdiction + exemption + calculation engine. All tiers.

Advanced tax provider set. Small tenants use the built-in NativeCalculator only. Medium+ unlocks TaxJar (US + international VAT), Avalara AvaTax (enterprise-grade global tax), Stripe Tax (integrated with Stripe billing).
HMAC-signed JSON webhook to a tenant-hosted tax engine. Escape hatch for tenants running their own tax computation infrastructure.
Add tenant-scoped custom jurisdictions beyond the platform reference set. Useful for niche subnational zones (free-trade zones, special economic zones, regional tourism taxes).
Manage reseller / non-profit / diplomatic / educational exemption certificates. Certificate upload + verification queue + expiry warnings.
Compute tax on transactions with source_currency values other than the tenant's default_region.currency. Medium+ tier.
End-of-year aggregated tax summary export per jurisdiction for regulator filing. All tiers.
Extends tax_calculations retention from 7 years (default) to 10 years. For finance regimes that require longer audit trails.
